name: VibroSense PGA OTA v2 (two-stage Miller, redesigned)
description: Two-stage Miller OTA with improved M5 length, M11 headroom, Cc/Rz compensation. Same 9-pin interface.

input_noise_nv_sqrthz_1k.note: Stage 2 adds noise referred back through gm5/gm1. Topology-limited.

psrr_db.note: Two-stage Miller has limited intrinsic PSRR. External bypass cap on PCB.

power_uw.note: 9.9 uW total. Cannot reduce below 8 uW without sacrificing UGB/PM — gm5 must stay high for 2nd pole placement at 400 kHz UGB.
